name: Cheesecake Cooky Bars
recipeIngredient: 3 Rolls of Chocolate Chip Cookie Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Lightly spray an 11 X 15-inch pan with cooking spray.
3. Slice and arrange 1 and 1/2 rolls of cookie dough into the bottom of the pan.
4. In a large bowl, mix together the cream cheese, eggs, sugar, and vanilla extract until smooth.
5. Pour the cream cheese mixture over the cookie dough in the pan.
6. Slice the remaining cookie dough and place it on top of the cream cheese mixture.
7. Bake for 50 to 60 minutes or until set.
8. Allow the bars to cool completely before refrigerating.
9. Once cooled, slice into bars.
